---
title: "Yijia Zhao"
image: assets/profile.png
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/Yijia-phys
    - text: "{{< fa brands orcid >}} ORCID"
      href: https://orcid.org/0009-0004-5515-2981
    - icon: envelope
      text: Mail
      href: mailto:echo@yijialog.org
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

<style>
/* Profile image */
.about-image img,
img.about-image {
  border-radius: var(--radius) !important;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  box-shadow: 0 2px 16px var(--shadow);
}

/* Social link buttons — override Quarto trestles default */
.about-links {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.6rem;
  margin-top: 1rem;
}

div.quarto-about-trestles .about-entity .about-link,
.quarto-about-trestles .btn-outline-dark {
  font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  color: var(--accent);
  border: 1px solid var(--accent);
  border-radius: 6px;
  padding: 0.35em 0.9em;
  background: transparent;
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.35rem;
}

div.quarto-about-trestles .about-entity .about-link:hover,
.quarto-about-trestles .btn-outline-dark:hover {
  background: var(--accent);
  color: #fff;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(90, 103, 216, 0.25);
}

/* About body text */
#hero-heading p {
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  color: var(--muted);
  line-height: 1.8;
  margin-bottom: 1.6rem;
}

/* About section headings */
#hero-heading h2 {
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  font-weight: 400;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--accent);
  margin-top: 1.8rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
  padding-bottom: 0.4rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
}

#hero-heading ul {
  list-style: none;
  padding: 0;
  margin: 0 0 0.5rem;
}

#hero-heading li {
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  color: var(--ink);
  line-height: 1.7;
  padding: 0.15rem 0;
}

#hero-heading li em,
#hero-heading p em {
  color: var(--muted);
  font-style: italic;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
}
</style>

:::{#hero-heading}

A high school student from Shenyang, China.

## Education

*(none yet)*

## Experience

*(none yet)*

:::
